powers.title: Start Here
powers.oneLineJob: Understand the collection and complete your first useful job.
powers.description: Orientation: explains what runs locally, recommends up to three relevant powers, and starts the one you pick.
optionalInputs: what you are trying to get done
outputs: up to three job-led recommendations
your first completed job
powers.privacy: Nothing is sent to the update server.

powers.title: Find a Power
powers.oneLineJob: Find the right capability without memorising names.
powers.description: Matches your job against the local catalogue; can optionally enrich results with live release information from the update server.
requiredInputs: the job you want done, or nothing to browse
outputs: up to three ranked recommendations with reasons
powers.privacy: Only your search query reaches the update server, and only when you want live information.

powers.title: What's New
powers.oneLineJob: See what changed after an update.
powers.description: Shows the installed version's changes and can check the update server for newer releases.
outputs: plain-language changelog
update instructions when newer exists
powers.privacy: Only the installed version number reaches the update server, and only when you want live information.

powers.title: Give Feedback
powers.oneLineJob: Tell the maker whether a power helped.
powers.description: Prepares a minimal feedback payload, shows it verbatim, and submits only after your explicit approval.
triggers: report a problem with the plugin
requiredInputs: which power and what you want to say
outputs: a shown-and-approved submission with receipt and deletion token
powers.privacy: Sends only the fields shown to and approved by you: skill id, optional rating, optional note.

powers.title: Request a Power
powers.oneLineJob: Ask for a job the collection doesn't cover yet.
powers.description: Turns a missing job into a concise request, shows the exact submission, and sends only after your explicit approval.
outputs: a shown-and-approved request with receipt and deletion token
powers.privacy: Sends only the job description you approve, never your conversation.

powers.title: AGENTS.md Setup
powers.oneLineJob: Create or optimize the AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md your AI reads.
powers.description: Interviews you (or audits your existing file), writes the instruction file your agent actually reads, installs it, and verifies it with a live test.
requiredInputs: a short interview about who you are and how you work
optionalInputs: an existing instruction file to improve
outputs: an installed instruction file under 60 lines
a passed fresh-session test
a maintenance habit

permissions.localWrites: the instruction file, with your confirmation

powers.privacy: Nothing is sent to the update server.

powers.title: Meeting Miner
powers.oneLineJob: Turn a meeting into decisions, insight, and the next move.
powers.description: Mines transcripts or notes beyond the summary: content ideas, messaging and offer clues, communication feedback, and won-versus-lost call patterns.
outputs: a structured report for the chosen mode
one best next move

permissions.localWrites: only when you request an artifact

powers.privacy: No content is sent to the update server.

powers.title: LLM Council
powers.oneLineJob: Pressure-test a decision from five independent angles.
powers.description: Five advisor lenses analyse your decision independently, peer-review each other anonymously, and a chairman synthesises a direct verdict. Honest about how independent the advisors can be on your host.
requiredInputs: a genuine decision with stakes and options
outputs: a council verdict: agreements, clashes, blind spots, recommendation, first step
an HTML report and transcript where file writes are supported
powers.privacy: No content is sent to the update server.

powers.title: Plain AI Explainer
powers.oneLineJob: Explain a difficult AI concept so a smart beginner gets it first read.
powers.description: Turns any technical AI topic into a plain-language explainer doc, social thread, newsletter section, or talk-track, using a capability-risk-fix opening and a directness test.
negativeTriggers: explain this code line by line
requiredInputs: the topic or source to explain
outputs: a plain-language explainer in the chosen format with verified format rules
powers.privacy: No content is sent to the update server.

powers.title: Instagram Carousel Maker
powers.oneLineJob: Turn one useful idea into an export-ready carousel package.
powers.description: Designs a branded, swipeable carousel with your colors and fonts: HTML preview plus 1080x1350 PNG export where the host supports it, or a complete structured handoff package where it doesn't.
requiredInputs: brand name, handle, and primary color
outputs: swipeable HTML preview
per-slide PNGs or a design handoff package

permissions.localWrites: HTML and PNG files where supported

powers.privacy: Never posts to Instagram or any platform. No content is sent to the update server.

powers.title: Operator Audit
powers.oneLineJob: Audit your last two weeks and get your 5 highest-leverage next tasks.
powers.description: Reads your recent local conversation history in this client, maps where the time went and what stalled, and recommends 5 tailored tasks with first steps. Fully local.
requiredInputs: consent to read local conversation history
outputs: where the time went
finished / stalled / repeated map
5 ranked tailored recommendations with first steps

permissions.localReads: local AI conversation history, audit window only

powers.privacy: History is read locally and never leaves the machine.

powers.title: De-Slop
powers.oneLineJob: Strip the AI tells out of writing without losing your voice.
powers.description: Edits a draft to remove telltale AI patterns (em dashes, stock phrases, uniform rhythm, empty claims) while keeping meaning and voice, then teaches you your top recurring tells.
negativeTriggers: detect if this is ai written
optionalInputs: voice notes or a sample of your writing
outputs: cleaned draft
grouped change list with your top 3 recurring tells
powers.privacy: The edit happens entirely in the conversation; nothing is sent anywhere.

powers.title: Voice DNA
powers.oneLineJob: Turn samples of your writing into your own portable writing-voice skill.
powers.description: Analyzes 3 to 5 samples of your real writing (register, rhythm, vocabulary, signature moves, never-rules), lets you correct the read, then generates a complete personal voice SKILL.md you own and can install in any AI tool. Proves it with a side-by-side test.
requiredInputs: 3 to 5 samples of your genuine writing from at least two contexts
optionalInputs: a topic for the proof test
outputs: your voice analysis with quoted evidence
a complete portable SKILL.md named after you
a side-by-side proof paragraph

permissions.localReads: only the samples you paste or point at
permissions.localWrites: the skill file, where you ask

powers.privacy: Samples and the generated skill stay in the conversation and on your machine.

powers.title: Daydreamer
powers.oneLineJob: Find the non-obvious connections hiding across your own notes and work.
powers.description: Collides distant pieces of the material you point at (notes, documents, recent work), attacks each candidate connection for novelty, evidence, and usefulness, and presents only the survivors with quotes and a concrete next move each.
requiredInputs: the folder, notes, or material to daydream over
optionalInputs: where to save the resulting insights
outputs: a short ranked list of surviving insights with quoted evidence
one concrete action per insight

permissions.localReads: only the material you point at
permissions.localWrites: an insights note, only where you ask

powers.privacy: Reads only what you point at; nothing leaves your machine.

powers.title: Weekly Review
powers.oneLineJob: Fifteen honest minutes on your week: moved, drifted, kill, and next week's one thing.
powers.description: A fixed four-part review (moved, drifted, kill-or-keep, the one thing) built from whatever evidence you have, saved as a dated one-page note, with a callback to last week's priority so the practice compounds.
requiredInputs: whatever evidence you have, or fifteen minutes to talk it through
outputs: a dated one-page review
one checkable priority for next week

permissions.localReads: the evidence you provide or point at
permissions.localWrites: the review note, where you keep notes

powers.privacy: The review is written only where you keep notes; nothing is sent anywhere.
